title: Aichi Gokoku Shrine
summary: The Aichi Prefecture Gokoku Shrine is a Shinto shrine located in the Sannomaru compound, next to Nagoya Castle, in central Nagoya, Japan.
text: The Aichi Prefecture Gokoku Shrine is a Shinto shrine located in the Sannomaru compound, next to Nagoya Castle, in central Nagoya, Japan.
